title: Principal Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
